{
  "judge_id": "...",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised draft presents a clear and logical argument chain, with each sentence building on the previous one to support the main claim.",
    "R1.3": "The evidence-claim alignment is excellent, with specific numbers (22–42 percentage points, ~85%, ~50%) supporting the claims made in the text.",
    "R1.6": "The writing polish is high-quality, with a clear and concise writing style that effectively communicates complex ideas to the reader.",
    "RX.1": "The uncertainty disclosure is excellent, with specific numbers and percentages used throughout the text to convey confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The scope adherence is good, with the revised draft staying within the agreed-upon active set of dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The downstream-harm avoidance is excellent, with no potential harm or negative consequences mentioned in the text.",

rationale.R1.2: The revised draft presents a clear and logical argument chain, with each sentence building on the previous one to support the main claim.
rationale.R1.3: The evidence-claim alignment is excellent, with specific numbers (22–42 percentage points, ~85%, ~50%) supporting the claims made in the text.
rationale.R1.6: The writing polish is high-quality, with a clear and concise writing style that effectively communicates complex ideas to the reader.
rationale.RX.1: The uncertainty disclosure is excellent, with specific numbers and percentages used throughout the text to convey confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The scope adherence is good, with the revised draft staying within the agreed-upon active set of dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The downstream-harm avoidance is excellent, with no potential harm or negative consequences mentioned in the text.
rationale.RX.5: The provenance and traceability are high-quality, with clear references to specific numbers and percentages used throughout the text.
